top_signals.title: How Russia is turning Ukraine’s drones against NATO
top_signals.summary: A Russian drone wounded two civilians in Romania on Friday, days after Lithuania detailed how Moscow is also steering Ukraine's drones onto allied soil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Unknown hacker group targeted Russian maritime universities, diplomats for nearly two years
top_signals.summary: More than half of the attacks observed over the past year targeted educational institutions, particularly maritime universities and schools that train personnel for Russia's shipping, inland waterway and fishing industries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Traders Cast Doubt on Speculative Tech After 57% Rally
top_signals.summary: The riskiest corners of the tech sector are outperforming their larger peers at the fastest pace in nearly six years. Now, many on Wall Street are sounding a warning to investors holding those stocks: Get out while you can.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Confirms Yen Intervention Over Past Month, Spending Record Sum - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Japan Confirms Yen Intervention Over Past Month, Spending Record Sum  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Navy to explore powering shore installations with aircraft carriers
top_signals.summary: Acting Navy Secretary Hung Cao revealed that Naval Station Norfolk will be “powered from an aircraft carrier" sometime this summer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Vyond Appoints SaaS Industry Veteran Scott Ernst as Chief Executive Officer
top_signals.summary: Gary Lipkowitz transitions to Vyond’s Board of Directors as the company expands its AI-powered enterprise communications platform and accelerates its next phase of enterprise growth
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Winston Taylor Completes Historic Transatlantic Combination
top_signals.summary: Transatlantic powerhouse law firm established for the businesses, people, and markets driving capital and innovation
